servicesPage.intro: From simple repairs to full solar installations, Supreme Electric and Solar offers a full range of electrical services tailored to Dallas homes and businesses. Each service is backed by our commitment to quality, safety, and customer satisfaction.

services.title: Electrical Repairs & Troubleshooting
services.shortDescription: Fast, reliable repairs for any electrical issue – from flickering lights to complete power outages.
services.longDescription: Our licensed electricians diagnose and fix electrical problems quickly and safely. We handle everything from faulty outlets and breaker trips to wiring issues and surge protection. Using advanced diagnostic tools, we pinpoint the root cause and provide lasting solutions. Emergency service available 24/7.

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We inspect the issue, test circuits, and identify the problem using state-of-the-art equipment.

process.title: Repair
process.description: Our electrician performs the repair, replacing or repairing components as needed.

process.title: Testing
process.description: We test the entire system to ensure everything works safely and efficiently.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to an emergency?
faqs.answer: We offer 24/7 emergency service and typically arrive within 1 hour for urgent calls in Dallas.

faqs.question: Do you charge for diagnostic calls?
faqs.answer: A small diagnostic fee applies, but it's credited toward any repair work you approve.

services.title: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your electrical panel for increased safety, capacity, and modern appliance support.
services.longDescription: Older panels can be a fire hazard and limit your home's electrical capacity. We replace outdated fuse boxes and breaker panels with modern, code-compliant units. Whether you need 100, 200, or 400 amp service, we design and install a panel that meets your current and future needs. Includes surge protection options.
benefits: Supports modern appliances and EV chargers

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your current panel, load requirements, and future needs.

process.title: Permitting
process.description: We handle all permits and coordinate with the utility company if needed.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Our team installs the new panel, rewires connections, and tests everything.

faqs.question: How long does a panel upgrade take?
faqs.answer: Most residential upgrades are completed in 4-8 hours, depending on complexity.

faqs.question: Do I need a permit for a panel upgrade?
faqs.answer: Yes, and we handle all permitting and inspections to ensure code compliance.

services.title: Solar Panel Installation
services.shortDescription: Custom solar systems that reduce your electricity bills and carbon footprint.
services.longDescription: Go solar with confidence. We design and install solar panel systems tailored to your home's energy usage and roof orientation. Using top-tier panels and inverters, we maximize efficiency and savings. Our turnkey service includes design, permitting, installation, and monitoring setup. Financing options available with $0 down.
benefits: Lower electricity bills by up to 50%

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We review your energy bills, assess your roof, and design a custom solar plan.

process.title: Permitting & Approval
process.description: We handle all paperwork, permits, and utility approvals.

process.title: Installation & Activation
process.description: Our crew installs panels and inverter, then connects to the grid for net metering.

faqs.question: How much can I save with solar?
faqs.answer: Typical savings range from 30-50% on monthly electricity bills, depending on system size and sun exposure.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer $0 down financing with flexible terms to fit your budget.

services.title: EV Charger Installation
services.shortDescription: Professional installation of Level 2 EV chargers for your home or business.
services.longDescription: Charge your electric vehicle faster and conveniently at home or work. We install Level 2 charging stations from leading brands like Tesla, ChargePoint, and JuiceBox. Our electricians ensure proper wiring, breaker sizing, and code compliance. We also offer commercial charging solutions for businesses and multi-unit dwellings.
benefits: Faster charging – up to 25 miles per hour

process.title: Site Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your electrical panel, parking location, and recommend the best charger.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We run conduit, install the charger, and connect it to a dedicated breaker.

process.title: Testing & Setup
process.description: We test the charger, show you how to use it, and register any warranties.

faqs.question: Do I need a panel upgrade for an EV charger?
faqs.answer: Not always. We assess your current panel capacity and advise if an upgrade is needed.

faqs.question: Can you install a Tesla Wall Connector?
faqs.answer: Yes, we install all major brands including Tesla, ChargePoint, and Grizzl-E.

about.headline: Your Trusted Dallas Electrician Since 2008
about.mission: To deliver safe, reliable, and innovative electrical solutions that power homes and businesses while exceeding customer expectations.
story: Supreme Electric and Solar was founded in 2008 by a veteran electrician with a vision to provide Dallas with honest, high-quality electrical services. Starting from a small truck, we built a reputation for reliability, transparency, and craftsmanship. Over the years, we expanded into solar energy, helping homeowners and businesses harness Texas' abundant sunshine.

Today, we are a family-owned team of licensed electricians and solar specialists serving the entire Dallas metroplex. We pride ourselves on same-day service, upfront pricing, and a lifetime workmanship warranty. Whether it's a simple outlet repair or a full solar installation, we treat every home like our own.

coreValues.title: Excellence

coreValues.title: Community

contact.headline: Get in Touch – We're Here to Help
